title: Symposium: Diotima's Ladder of Love
description: Diotima teaches Socrates the ascent of love: from one beautiful body to all bodies, to the beauty of souls, to Beauty itself.
introduction: Diotima teaches Socrates the ascent of love: from one beautiful body to all bodies, to the beauty of souls, to Beauty itself.

translation.text: Beginning from beautiful bodies, one ascends to beautiful souls, to beautiful practices, to beautiful forms of knowledge, until at last one arrives at Beauty itself.
